reviews.review_title: Good game but its missing things
reviews.review_description:
I think it needs a better damage model, and some less pricey planes and vehicles. More ww1 and ww2 maps and have teams
—noobgoober

Solid multiplayer plane game. Flying around is fun by itself, but being part of a squad going off to complete various missions is compelling too. The environments are fairly basic and everything could use some further polish, but you can get some multiplayer fun out of Dogfight Elite.
First time using it and love it! Still need to learn how to use all the features but so far so good :)
I love how you can go from inside the airplane to riding a horse when they bring you down.
